payload.text: Create a professional personal website for me using the below details

**Defining Website Scope**

I'm currently focused on defining the initial scope of Pavan Tiwari's personal website. He's a Data Scientist at ArcelorMittal Nippon Steel India. My goal is to showcase his expertise in Applied Machine Learning, Statistical Learning, Data Science, Deep Learning, Keras, and NLP. The site will be built around his resume, highlighting his core skills and experience.


**Elaborating on Content**

My focus has shifted to the granular content. I've fleshed out the 'Experience' section with specific roles and companies. I have detailed data points for his education. I've decided to highlight the contact information. I'm imagining a professional, clean website with a tech-forward look. I have a color scheme (dark blues, slates, whites). The site's navigation will be a sticky header with About, Experience, Skills, Education, and Contact links. The site will have interactive features: smooth scrolling, hover effects, and maybe a "Chat with my AI Portfolio" feature (Gemini).


**Structuring Website Architecture**

I've been mapping out the core structure of the website using React and TypeScript. I'm leaning heavily on components to keep things organized. I'm focusing on key sections: Header, Hero, Experience, Skills, Education, a fun AI Chatbot, and Footer.  I'm aiming for a dark, professional theme with clean typography and Lucide icons.  I've decided to tackle the date overlap in the Experience section and design the AI Chatbot's interface.


**Incorporating AI Integration**

I'm now incorporating AI integration, using Gemini to create an interactive experience. Users can ask questions about Pavan's background, and the AI will respond. I'm prioritizing the key areas Pavan mentioned. I'm focusing on ensuring high contrast for accessibility and a mobile-first responsive design.

entries.description: Application metadata including name and description.
Main HTML entry point with Tailwind CSS and Lucide icons.
React entry point using React 18 createRoot API.
Service to interact with Gemini API for the portfolio chatbot.
Common layout components like Header and Footer.
Main application component with sections and smooth scrolling.
